meaning: n.赤贫,乞食的习惯,卑鄙,卑劣
examples: His speculation reduced him to beggary.
From this it was but a step to beggary.
Idleness is key of beggary and the root of all evil.
" An astute observer of academia, Mr. Burton identifies scholars as a high-risk group for melancholy because they're so often "exposed to want, poverty and beggary.
